articles.title: Chelsea teen charged with murder after allegedly chasing down, stabbing man
articles.description:
The 18-year-old suspect was part of a group who allegedly chased the victim down and repeatedly stabbed him.

The post Chelsea teen charged with murder after allegedly chasing down, stabbing man appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Chelsea teen, 18, charged with murder for allegedly stabbing a man multiple times.
Incident involved a group chasing the victim, heightening local safety concerns.
Residents worry about rising violence in Chelsea following this tragic event.

articles.title: 2025 marked Boston area’s slowest year of post-pandemic population growth, data shows
articles.description:
Yearly population growth both in the metro area and statewide was dramatically lower in 2025 than any year since 2021.

The post 2025 marked Boston area’s slowest year of post-pandemic population growth, data shows appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: 2025 saw Boston's lowest population growth since 2021, impacting local economy and services.
The metro area's growth rate significantly declined compared to previous years, affecting housing demand.
Residents may face increased pressure on resources as stagnation continues in population trends.
